notes: The file builds the universal Weierstrass curve specialization machinery (ported from LutzNagell) used heavily by DivisionPolynomial.lean and algebraMap_poly_injective which is the most-used declaration across the wider project. There is one non-heartbeats set_option (backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false, no comment) before algebraMap_poly_injective. No sorries, no long proofs, all declarations are axiom-clean.
